In Evidence Based Healthcare: Zdravotnictví Založenéna Vˇedeckých D˚ukazech, 1st ed.; Klugarov á, J.,Mareˇcková, J., Eds.; Univerzita Palackého v Olomouci: Olomouc, Czech Republic, 2015; pp. 17–33. 滿意？

experts consensus?

replies.msg:
張圖都唔係piece of evidence to proof anything, 點會用level of evidence 去rate ，用下腦啦
張圖係based on experiment 嘅規格排唔同evidence嘅可信程度，例如一個meta analysis嘅conclusion話一個treatment有/冇用比一個expert話‘覺得’有冇用可信。

replies.msg: Statistically, 邊個易啲make type1/2 error咪低啲排位lor。正如球會邊個高分，邊個排高啲一樣，數字上有優勢咪排高啲，expert opinion 直頭數據佐證都冇，當然排最低。

replies.msg:
